'''鈭歬-d-f-f''' ('''kakadfefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberise|rubberise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberise|rubberise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-d-f-f
|-
! Lemma
| kakadfefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
